title: XIMISHOP 24 Pieces Glitter Christmas Poinsettia Flowers，Red Gold Artificial Poinsettia Christmas Flowers for Xmas Tree Wreath Decorations Wedding Party Decor
features: 【Package Contents】You will receive 24 exquisite red & gold coloured glitter Christmas flowers, 24 deep green stems, and a small packet of silver cable ties. This ample quantity is sufficient to decorate a magnificent Christmas tree, adding a warm and joyful festive atmosphere to your Christmas family gathering.

【Product Materials】The petals of the glitter Christmas poinsettia flowers are crafted from plush-textured fabric and plastic coated with glitter, ensuring they retain their vibrant colour over time. Featuring a three-tiered design with leaves of varying sizes, the middle layer incorporates shimmering glitter leaves, lending the blossom a more three-dimensional and refined appearance. You may pair it with other favourite Christmas decorations to create a joyful festive atmosphere.

【Dimensions】The glitter artificial poinsettia measure approximately 5.5 inches (14cm) in diameter, with deep green stems extending to about 7.9 inches (20cm). Each of the 30 silver-plated wire stems measures roughly 5.9 inches (15cm) in length. Each flower features a stem hole at its base, allowing for easy insertion into the stem or secure fastening with wire. You can effortlessly arrange them in a vase to adorn your Christmas table, adding a touch of elegance and dazzling brilliance to your home.

【Easy to Use】Each Christmas poinsettia decorations comes with a stem and wire, allowing you to secure the blooms wherever you wish to decorate. They are easy to maintain and clean, and can be reused year-round, always retaining their fresh, vibrant beauty without wilting or fading. They make ideal decorations for homes, weddings, parties, banquets, shops, receptions, and more.

【Versatile Uses】Our Christmas poinsettia flower will add a vibrant splash of colour to your home. They are perfect for Christmas family gatherings, home decoration, weddings, bridal bouquets, DIY wreaths, harvest celebrations, anniversaries, table centre piece decorations, gardens, and more. Whether used to adorn your living space, embellish festive occasions, or presented as a present to others, they offer a unique visual delight and emotional resonance.

🩷🩷🩷Kindly note: As the Christmas tree flower decorations are coated with a generous amount of glitter, some sparkle may shed during transit or upon opening the packaging. This is entirely normal and will not affect their overall visual appeal or usability. Thank you for your understanding. Wishing you a very Merry Christmas!
description: Product description Christmas Flower Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources.
